ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each stock (e.g., 000001.XSHE) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta coefficient of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the stock information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_metrics" (
  "code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the metrics are calculated */,
  "leverage" REAL /* Leverage of the stock */,
  "sharpe_ratio_20" REAL /* Sharpe ratio over the last 20 days */,
  "ROC20" REAL /* Return on capital over the last 20 days */,
  "VOL20" REAL /* Volatility over the last 20 days */,
  "liquidity" REAL /* Liquidity of the stock */,
  "BIAS20" REAL /* BIAS over the last 20 days */,
  "residual_volatility" REAL /* Residual volatility over the last 20 days */,
  "MFI14" REAL /* Money flow index over the last 14 days */,
  "earnings_yield" REAL /* Earnings yield of the stock */,
  "momentum" REAL /* Momentum of the stock */,
  "ATR" REAL /* Average true range of the stock */,
  "MTM" REAL /* Money flow momentum of the stock */,
  "MACD" REAL /* Moving average convergence divergence of the stock */,
  "RSI" REAL /* Relative strength index of the stock */,
  "PSY" REAL /* Psychological line of the stock */,
  "CYR" REAL /* Cycles of the stock */,
  "price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "pb_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-book ratio */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "book_value" REAL /* Book value per share */,
  "52_week_high" REAL /* 52-week high price */,
  "52_week_low" REAL /* 52-week low price */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the metrics were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was last updated */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Current total value of the portfolio */,
  "return_percentage" REAL /* Return percentage of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the stock */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock held in the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the portfolio stock information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code of the stock the alert is for */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was last triggered */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the alert is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_code FOREIGN KEY ("code") REFERENCES stocks ("code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code of the stock the data is for */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price */,
  "trading_value" REAL /* Total trading value */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the market data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "code")
)
